name: Cal.com
description: Cal.com is an open-source scheduling platform and the leading alternative to Calendly. It offers full data ownership, self-hosting options, a generous free cloud tier, and advanced routing forms — making it popular with developers and privacy-conscious teams.
pros: Open source with full data ownership
More generous free plan than Calendly
use_cases: You want full data ownership over your scheduling — self-hosting means no third-party holds your booking data
Your team needs routing forms to send leads to the right rep based on answers before they book
You're a developer who needs webhook and API access to embed scheduling flows inside your own product
You want the same core functionality as Calendly but with a more generous free plan and open-source flexibility
